title: Review: vault doc, tests for put-without-field path
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — formatting, doc correction, two tests. No new logic, no new public surface, no security exposure.

Confidence: 97% no missed bug. Uncertainty: integration_put_full_json_and_get is gated on SECRETX_VAULT_TEST so it only runs with a live Vault; I reviewed the logic but haven't seen it execute. Would raise confidence if: run with SECRETX_VAULT_TEST set.
